index.title: LingoDesk — Chat with the world in your native language on Telegram
index.desc: LingoDesk is an automatic translation relay for Telegram Business: incoming messages arrive translated into your language, and your replies go out in theirs — sent as you.
index.og_title: LingoDesk — Chat with the world in your native language
index.og_desc: An automatic translation relay for Telegram Business. Receive → translate → reply → translate, sent as you.
index.badge: Free plan · Open source · Cancel anytime
index.hero_h1: Chat with the world in your native language
index.hero_sub: Customers write to your personal Telegram in any language. It lands translated into yours; you reply in yours — it reaches them in theirs, sent as you. Fully automatic.
index.cta_note: Free to start, no server or code. Go Pro anytime, or self-host the open source.
index.mock_translation: Hi, how much is the full package?
index.mock_reply: Package A is $100 and includes everything.
index.how_lead: One dedicated topic per contact in your private console group. Nothing changes on their side — they just see you, fluent.
index.step1_p: Spanish, Russian, Arabic — any language, straight to your personal account. LingoDesk listens silently.
index.step2_p: Original and translation side by side in a bilingual card, inside that contact's own topic.
index.step3_p: Type naturally. AI translates; you see a preview and nothing is sent until you approve it.
index.step4_p: They see your own account replying fluently in their native tongue. No bot in sight.
index.feat1_h: Your real account, your own bot
index.feat1_p: Built on the official Telegram Business channel with a bot you create and can revoke any time. Token sovereignty, by design.
index.feat2_p: Detected from the first message, targeted on every reply. One command to correct it — or to switch your own language.
index.feat3_p: Each translation is shown to you first and goes out only on your confirmation. Accidental sends are structurally impossible.
index.feat4_p: Messages, photos and files archived in both directions — original next to translation, retrievable any time.
index.pricing_title: Free to start. Pro when you scale.
index.pricing_lead: No server, no code — set up from your phone in ~10 minutes. Or self-host the open source, free forever.
index.free_li4: Translation engine included, no API keys
index.pro_li4: Pay in Telegram Stars · cancel anytime
index.self_li1: Your machine, your data — full control
index.self_li4: Zero lock-in, graduate from hosted anytime
index.final_p: From creating your bot to your first cross-language reply — every step illustrated, every pitfall flagged.
about.title: About & Contact — LingoDesk
about.desc: LingoDesk lets anyone chat and do business across languages on Telegram — sent as you, fully automatic. Get in touch: hello@lingodesk.org
about.hero_tag: Chat and do business with the world — in your native language.
about.build_p1: LingoDesk turns your personal Telegram into a cross-language desk. Customers write to you in any language; every message lands translated into yours, in a tidy per-contact thread. You reply in your own language — it's translated back and sent as you, automatically. The other side never sees a bot; they just see you, fluent in their tongue.
about.build_p2: It's built for freelancers, cross-border sellers and small teams who close deals in chat — people for whom a missed or clumsy reply is a lost customer.
about.diff_1: Your own bot, your token. Everything runs through a bot you create and can revoke any time — full control, no black box.
about.diff_2: Open source, no lock-in. MIT-licensed. Let us host it, or run it on your own server — same code, your choice.
about.diff_3: Small and focused. An independent product built by people who care about cross-border communication, not growth-at-all-costs.
about.contact_note: Questions, feedback, partnerships, or help getting set up — we read every email.
